zh.lifeSummary: 當William Bowyer of Petworth於大約1465年出生在英國素可時，他的父親Richard Bowyer of Petworth32歲，母親Joan Gunter27歲。他於大約1495年與Elizabeth Tredcroft結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1528年5月19日之前在英國素可特沃斯，埋葬在英國素可特沃斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Bowyer of Petworth于大约1465年出生在英国素可时，他的父亲Richard Bowyer of Petworth32岁，母亲Joan Gunter27岁。他于大约1495年与Elizabeth Tredcroft结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1528年5月19日之前在英国素可特沃斯，埋葬在英国素可特沃斯。

nameMeanings.name: Bowyer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a maker or seller of bows, or an archer, from Middle English bowyere, an agent derivative of Old English boga ‘bow’. Compare Bowman .

variants.name: Bowman
meanings: English and Scottish: occupational name for an archer, hunter or soldier armed with a bow, from Middle English bow(e)man, bouman (from Old English boga ‘bow’ + mann ‘man’). This word was distinguished from Bowyer , which denoted a maker or seller of bows.
Americanized form of German   Baumann   or the Dutch cognate   Bouwman  .

variants.name: Bouyer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Frederique, Monique, Napoleon.
French (southern): regional variant of   Bouvier  . Compare   Beyea  .

variants.name: Boyers
meanings: English (Lincolnshire): variant of Bowyer , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Bowyer of Petworth was born about 1465, in Sussex, England, his father, Richard Bowyer of Petworth, was 32 and his mother, Joan Gunter, was 27. He married Elizabeth Tredcroft about 1495. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died before 19 May 1528, in Petworth, Sussex, England, and was buried in Petworth, Sussex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Bowyer of Petworth est né environ 1465, à Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Richard Bowyer of Petworth, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Joan Gunter, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Tredcroft environ 1495. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé avant 19 mai 1528, à Petworth, Sussex, Angleterre, et a été enterré à Petworth, Sussex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Bowyer of Petworth um 1465 in Sussex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Bowyer of Petworth 32 und seine Mutter Joan Gunter 27. Er hat um 1495 Elizabeth Tredcroft geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb vor 19. Mai 1528 in Petworth, Sussex, England und wurde in Petworth, Sussex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Bowyer of Petworth è nato il circa 1465 nel Sussex, England, il suo padre, Richard Bowyer of Petworth, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Joan Gunter, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Tredcroft circa 1495. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì prima del 19 maggio 1528, nel Petworth, Sussex, England, e fu sepolto a Petworth, Sussex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William Bowyer of Petworthが約1465年にイギリススセックスで生まれた時，父Richard Bowyer of Petworthは32歳，母Joan Gunterは27歳であった。約1495年にElizabeth Tredcroftと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1528年5月19日以前にイギリススセックスペトウオルスで死去し，イギリススセックスペトウオルスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Bowyer of Petworth(이)가 대략 1465년 영국 수세스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Bowyer of Petworth(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Gunter(은)는 27세였다. 그는 대략 1495년 Elizabeth Tredcroft(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1528년 5월 19일 이전 영국 수세스 페트워스에서 사망했으며 영국 수세스 페트워스에 묻혔다.

mn.abt 1465–before 19 May 1528: ойролцоогоор 1465 он–1528 оны Тавдугаар сарын 19–наас өмнө

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Bowyer of Petworth nasceu aproximadamente 1465, em Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Bowyer of Petworth, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Joan Gunter, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Tredcroft aproximadamente 1495. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 19 de maio de 1528, em Petworth, Sussex, Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em Petworth, Sussex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Bowyer of Petworth родился около 1465 г. в местности суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Bowyer of Petworth было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Gunter, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Tredcroft около 1495 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер перед 19 май 1528 г. в местности петворт, суссекс, Англия и был похоронен в местности петворт, суссекс, Англия.

sm.abt 1465–before 19 May 1528: e tusa o le 1465–a'e le'I oo le 19 Me 1528

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Bowyer of Petworth nació aproximadamente 1465, en Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Bowyer of Petworth, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Joan Gunter, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Tredcroft aproximadamente 1495. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió antes de 19 de mayo de 1528, en Petworth, Sussex, Inglaterra, y fue sepultado en Petworth, Sussex, Inglaterra.
